candidates.why: Best direct match to total revenue/top-line from candidate list.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.
Balancing row, not a reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct reported revenue line as priority revenue label.

candidates.why: Direct match for cost of goods sold / cost of revenues.

variables.notes: Direct COGS line from candidate list.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component; populated and not a total/subtotal.
Also an SG&A-type overhead component for at least some years.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row exists. Selected overhead component rows. Included 'Research and development costs' as well because it appears as a separate operating expense line and PROF uses (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD), so including it here helps maintain SG&A coverage before subtracting XRD. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Research and development costs

candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense; appears as a reported line item.
Broader finance-cost bucket; useful fallback if interest expense unavailable in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Too narrow/specific to lease liabilities; fallback only if broader interest line missing.
Direct semantic match but preview shows blank; still a valid fallback because row exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental narrow lease-interest disclosure, not preferred.

variables.notes: Priority list: direct interest expense first, then broader financial expenses, then alternate interest-expense label. Excluded lease-liability interest rows because they are too narrow and supplemental.

candidates.why: Best available book equity line. Preferred over 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' because that could include minority interest, and 'Total equity and liabilities' is not equity.
Potentially includes minority interest, so less preferred for BE.
Not an equity line; total balance sheet.

variables.notes: Used 'Total Equity' as the best available equity measure. No separate parent-equity line is shown.

candidates.why: Income statement minority line is not preferred for balance-sheet MIB mapping.
Income statement minority line is not preferred for balance-sheet MIB mapping.
Correct concept if present as a balance-sheet NCI line, but preview provides no indication of a separate non-controlling interest amount.
Aggregate total, not a standalone minority-interest line.

variables.notes: No clear standalone non-controlling interest/minority interest balance-sheet amount is identifiable. Since BE uses 'Total Equity', MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
